title: Chief Science & Research Officer
summary: The research leader who protects scientific defensibility, evidence discipline, research integrity, and responsible translation into product.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Science & Research Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The research leader who protects scientific defensibility, evidence discipline, research integrity, and responsible translation into product.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Ensure Neuroartan’s cognitive and research-facing claims remain grounded, reviewable, and structurally defensible.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
